commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 6:70 And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with its pasture lands, and Bileam with its pasture lands, for the family of the rest of the sons of Kohath. Aner and Baalam, perhaps the same as Thanach and Gethremmon, which were given to the children of Caath of the inferior degree, (Josue xxi. ; Calmet) or, who were left out of the rank of priests, (Menochius) or before unprovided for, as the partition was made at different times. Hebrew, "Balaam. "Septuagint, "Iblaam "is the Jeblaam, Josue xvii.
